title: Hepetis rubiginosa
taxonomy: Hepetis rubiginosa is classified within the plant family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Heliotropium. The species is native to South Africa. This plant is often referred to as a type of flowering herb. It is part of the larger family of flowering plants known as angiosperms.
uses: Hepetis rubiginosa is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
